title: FoodHub
description: FoodHub is a platform designed to minimize food waste and combat hunger by enabling individuals to share their surplus food at an affordable cost. By connecting those with excess food to those in need, FoodHub fosters a community of resourcefulness and compassion. The platform incorporates a secure facial recognition system for payment authentication.

title: Insect Splash
description: Inspect Splash is an engaging game that uses Computer Vision and hand-tracking technology to create an interactive experience where players aim to eliminate insects on the screen within a specified time frame. The game challenges players' speed and accuracy, making it a fun and immersive way to explore the capabilities of Computer Vision in a playful setting.

title: PolyApps
description: PolyApps is a suite of applications developed to enhance the activities of the AI Club at the National Higher Polytechnic School of Douala. It includes PolyTyping: A real-time typing multiplayer speed game that challenges participants to improve their typing skills through competitive gameplay and PolyCoding, A robust coding platform designed to host coding contests, encouraging learning and collaboration among students.

title: Spoof Detector
description: Built a Spoof Detector as a Deep learning model designed to differentiate between real and fake faces, to enhance the security of facial recognition systems. Trained on a diverse dataset with faces of various races, this model ensures robust performance across different demographics. The Spoof Detector is accessible via a RESTful API, allowing easy integration into various applications.

title: Mathematical Morphology
description: Implemented Mathematical Morphology concepts from scratch using numpy and matplotlib for academic study. Explored advanced techniques such as erosion, dilation, and feature extraction. Conducted rigorous performance evaluations and optimizations to improve efficiency and accuracy of operations. The project aimed to deepen understanding of morphological operations and their application in digital image processing.
